title: Why Do We Fight the Empire?
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Why_do_we_fight_the_empire.jpg|thumb|250px|The document.]]
'''''Why Do We Fight the Empire?''''' was a document released to galaxywide [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] media organizations in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].

==Details==
The document was organized into five reasons ('it' referring to the Empire):
#"Because it is not legal"
#"Because it is not moral"
#"Because it is not socially responsible"
#"Because it is not tolerant"
#"Because it must be stopped"

It was signed by Mon Mothma, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], [[Borsk Fey'lya]], [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], [[Jenssar SoBilles]], [[Sian Tevv/Legends|Sian Tevv]], [[Verrinnefra B'thog Indriummsegh]], [[Doman Beruss (Corellian)|Doman Beruss]], [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], [[Kerrithrarr/Legends|Kerrithrarr]], and [[Kahr'corvh]], displaying a mix of Alliance founders and representatives of newly liberated peoples.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' {{1stm}}
